The '''CT-11 space tug''' was a ubiquitous utility craft during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was manufactured by [[Phylon Freight/Legends|Phylon Freight]].

==Characteristics==
The [[Spacetug/Legends|tug]] was 5 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long. It used 2 [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors to pull [[Xizor cargo container]]s. The tugs could also be used to carry pilots to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] in [[Realspace/Legends|space]].
The space tug was extremely similar to [[Nicholas/Gordon Spacewerks/Legends|Nicholas/Gordon Spacewerks']] [[Utility Tug/Legends|Utility Tug]], although the NGS craft was almost twice the size.

==Behind the scenes==
While the tech room reveals different manufacturers, and a subtly different design between this craft and the [[Utility Tug/Legends|Utility Tug]], in the X-wing Collector's Edition the Utility Tug model is used to represent this craft. It is probable that the developers simply invented a new manufacturer for the same craft while the later games were in production.
